description:
Hi,

Following up on the portfolio site — the gallery section loads slowly on mobile and the full-res images take several seconds to render. What does load looks great, but I want to rework the landing page after the Olmsted editorial wraps next week. Logging it here so it's on record.

Thanks,
Jesse Page
subject: Portfolio site — slow gallery load on mobile

description:
Hi,

The Bedford Ave location switched oat milk brands about three weeks ago — the new one doesn't steam the same way and the microfoam breaks before I'm halfway down the block. I'm in there most mornings before shoots, so it's become a small recurring thing. Can you confirm whether the switch is permanent or a supply gap?

Thanks,
Jesse Page
subject: Oat milk brand switch at Sweetleaf Bedford Ave

description:
Hi,

Second time this week my scheduled follow-up sequences haven't gone out — the Olmsted shoot follow-up, a proposal to Lula Mae, and a seasonal inquiry reply to Islas. Drafts are saved, segments look correct, nothing in the error log. On the Studio plan. I have a shoot this afternoon and need this resolved before I walk out the door.

Jesse Page
subject: Scheduled email sequences not sending

description:
Hi,

Update on the Greenpoint scout — locked the rooftop location for the Botanica campaign before the restaurant below changes their mind about access. Did a prop run for matte black ceramics, and I'm editing the dumpling series tonight, roughly 400 frames from a two-hour shoot. Logging the project notes here.

Jesse Page
subject: Botanica campaign — Greenpoint rooftop scout notes

description:
Hi,

Still getting a 401 unauthorized error pulling client emails through the API — three days now. OAuth credentials are current (refreshed Friday), scopes are gmail.readonly and gmail.send, but the token refresh isn't firing when the access token expires. Feels server-side. Can you check whether project permissions changed after the last ticket?

Jesse Page
subject: Gmail API 401 — token refresh not firing

description:
Hi,

The Google Calendar API integration still isn't pulling my shoot blocks into the third-party scheduler. Events created directly in Google show up fine; anything pushed via the API from my booking form disappears. Reproducible every time. Can you confirm whether the token-refresh fix actually shipped? I have three restaurant clients booked through July.

Jesse Page
subject: Google Calendar API — events not syncing via API

description:
Hi,

Still seeing a permissions error when the app tries to pull reach data via the Instagram API — "this endpoint requires the 'pages_read_engagement' permission." Re-authorized three times. I use this to pull post performance for client recap decks and I'm rebuilding the numbers manually right now. Can you confirm whether the scope update propagated, or do I need to resubmit app review?

Jesse Page
subject: Instagram API — pages_read_engagement permission error

description:
Hi,

The webhook endpoint is still returning 400s on invoice.payment_succeeded events — consistently when clients pay via ACH, not card. Six outstanding invoices are in limbo. Endpoint secret rotated twice, URL confirmed live, and your logs show the event firing fine. Running API version 2023-10-16. Is there a known issue with ACH webhooks?

Jesse Page
subject: Stripe webhook 400s on ACH payment events
